caption:
BROCKFEST UPDATE! Suena Bien are building an extra bass unit for BROCKFEST free festival on 14th September featuring an 18 inch sub. Suena Bien designers Carlos Figueroa and Oli Evans say “We want to improve the overall sound by relaxing the deeper bass on the two 15inch speakers in the tower units. The extra bass unit will allow us to project sound right down and below the range of the human ear. But that’s important. You’ve got to ‘feel’ the bass.”

Carlos also helped build ‘Sunflower Sound System’ - a 6 tower speaker system used at the Silver Hayes area of Glastonbury this year in collaboration with British DJ Floating Points and sound engineer Michael Parker. You can read more about this system in dzeen’s online magazine (posted on 27/6). 

BROCKFEST is a free music festival and a celebration of musical journeys of the artists who’ve sharpened their musical skill & stagecraft at JOM Junior & Youth Open Mics across 8 years. Our budget for BROCKFEST is £0 - so it’s put together with favours and kindness - most of which money can’t buy. Thank you Suena Bien. 🙏 We are a community. ❤️

@suenabien.soundsystem @fig.g @brockwell_live @hernehillmfest @hernehillforumofficial @bbclondon @itvlondon @lambethmusic @lambeth_council
